Who We Are

Kolkata's Most Trusted Office Automation Partner

Established on 27th July 2006, Unitech is a professionally managed organisation specialising in Currency Handling Equipment and Security Systems. With over 20 years of industry presence, we have built a solid reputation in a highly competitive market.

We are a quality-driven organisation — every product is marketed only after full performance validation. Our One-Year Comprehensive Warranty is backed by rapid on-site service and immediate spares availability.

Wide Product Range

Currency counters, sorters (1+1, 2+1, 4+1), fake note detectors, bundle counters, shredders, safes, laminators, binders and more.

Expert After-Sales Service

On-site technician support with immediate availability of spares and peripherals for every model we carry.

Learn More

Service Channels
Industries Served

Trusted Across Every Cash-Intensive Sector

Our machines are deployed daily where accuracy and uptime are non-negotiable.

Nationalised Banks
High-volume sorters and counters for daily teller and cash centre operations
Jewellery Shops
Compact, accurate machines for high-value cash transactions and fake note detection
Financial Institutions
Mix value counters and fitness sorters for compliance-grade cash management
Retail & Shopping Malls
Fast, reliable counters for POS cash desks and end-of-day reconciliation
Detection Technology

Multi-Layer Counterfeit Detection

Our machines combine multiple detection technologies in a single pass — no fake note slips through, even the most sophisticated counterfeits.

UV
Ultraviolet Detection
Detects UV-reactive security marks on genuine notes
99.9%
MG
Magnetic (MG) Sensing
Reads magnetic ink signatures of authentic banknotes
99.7%
IR
Infrared Scanning
Infrared transparency check against note-specific patterns
99.5%
CIS
CIS Image Verification
Full note image capture for serial number & fitness check
100%
